CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-29-2021 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-08-2021 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Nov-16-21 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar May-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: PLAINTIFF ALEXANDER HARDY'S Notice Of Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Complaint is GRANTED. First Amended Complaint to be filed and served forthwith. No opposition filed. Judge: Vedica Puri; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-08-2021 Continued To Jul-12-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION / Notice Of Motion For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Apr-23-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

James Patrick; Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP; 415-362-2580; appearing via Zoom on behalf of defendants Henry Rosenthal and Carola Anderson.
Andrew Westley; Law Office of Andrew Westley; 415-362-2817; appearing via Zoom on behalf of plaintiff Alexander Hardy.

Defendant contests the tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANTS HENRY ROSENTHAL and CAROLA ANDERSON's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION is DENIED. Triable issues of fact exist as to the bad faith and the circumstances leading to Plaintiff vacating the property. Prevailing party to prepare order in conformity with CCP 437c(g). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION / Notice Of Motion For Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Apr-09-2021 Continued To Apr-22-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT HENRY ROSENTHAL, CAROLA ANDERSON MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION / Notice Of Motion For Summary Adjudication
is continued to April 22, 2021 to be heard with other pending motions. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
